completed_steps.summary: Documentation requirements loaded for web + backend project types
Classified as monorepo with 2 parts: frontend (web / Nuxt 4) + backend (backend / FastAPI)
Inventoried existing docs: README.md, CLAUDE.md, .env.example, Makefile, specs/ (18 features), documents_et_brouillons/. No prior docs/ content.

Tech stacks: frontend Nuxt 4.4 + Vue 3 + Pinia 3 + Tailwind 4 + Chart.js/Mermaid/GSAP ; backend FastAPI ≥0.115 + SQLAlchemy async 2 + asyncpg + LangGraph ≥0.2 + LangChain ≥0.3 + Alembic + Pydantic v2 + WeasyPrint + PyMuPDF + OpenRouter Claude Sonnet 4

Conditional analysis via 2 parallel Explore subagents: 73 endpoints REST, 16 SQLAlchemy models, 13 Alembic migrations, 10 LangGraph nodes, 12 tool files (~100 tools), 9 prompts, 18 pages, 56 components, 14 composables, 11 Pinia stores, 11 type files
Source tree analysis written to source-tree-analysis.md
Development and deployment guides extracted from README/Makefile/docker-compose.yml/.env.example and written to development-guide.md + deployment-guide.md
Integration architecture documented: REST JSON + SSE streaming + multipart upload, JWT auth, CORS, observability via tool_call_logs
Architecture docs written for 2 parts: architecture-frontend.md + architecture-backend.md
Supporting docs written: project-overview.md, data-models-backend.md, api-contracts-backend.md, component-inventory-frontend.md, project-parts.json
Master index.md generated with full navigation, no incomplete markers
Validation: zero `_(To be generated)_` markers, all 12 files present

findings.frontend_summary: SPA Nuxt 4 + Vue 3 Composition API + Pinia 3 + TailwindCSS 4 + Chart.js/Mermaid/GSAP. 18 pages, 56 composants, 14 composables, 11 stores Pinia, dark mode obligatoire.
findings.backend_summary: FastAPI monolithe + SQLAlchemy async 2 + LangGraph (10 nœuds) + ~100 tools LangChain + OpenRouter Claude Sonnet 4. ~73 endpoints REST, 16 modèles, 13 migrations Alembic, ~935 tests pytest.
findings.integration_summary: REST JSON + SSE streaming (POST /api/chat/{id}/messages) + multipart upload. Auth JWT HS256. CORS en dur localhost:3000. Pas de rate limiting.

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To re-run documentation or deep-dive a specific area, invoke bmad-document-project again.
